meta.taxability_source: THD Window Tax Chart (eff. 2025-03-21) + Decorview/DirectBuy/Macy's/JCP chart (2024-03), transcribed in 2026-06-05_RLN_tax_docs_analysis.md
meta.rate_source: Tax Foundation, State and Local Sales Tax Rates 2025; county/city combined rates verified 2025-2026
meta.disclaimer: Taxability flags are authoritative from the channel tax charts. RATES are estimates: county-seed rows are verified point rates; all other localities fall back to the state population-weighted average combined rate. Production requires a rooftop tax API (Avalara/TaxJar) keyed to full address.
meta.canada: Province-level rate table from Canada Tax Chart 6.9.2026 (Costco/Decorview/DirectBuy). All lines taxable; BC drapery/workroom +PST. No address rate lookup.

provinces.name: British Columbia
provinces.note: PST 7% applies ONLY to Draperies & Workroom (->12%). Installation and other goods are GST-only.

canada.exceptions: BC: Draperies & Workroom Product line = 12% (GST+PST), all else 5%.
canada.source: Costco/Decorview/DirectBuy Window Coverings — Canada chart, updated 2025-04-02 (KOM); file 'Canada Tax Chart 6.9.2026.pdf'.

warranty.note: $149-$249 warranty fee. Channel-agnostic across Decorview/DirectBuy/Macy's/Sam's Club/JCP/THD. Do NOT use for reselections/conversions/parts/repairs (use the service-call chart). Flat state-only rate overrides apply where listed; Design Consultation Fee column is Decorview-only. Source: All US channel WARRANTY FEES Tax-cheatsheets 2024.
